title: Baroque Works Moves in Secret
description: On pages 15–16, this part focuses on baroque works moves in secret, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Baroque Works Moves in Secret. The journey through the desert continues, mixing exhaustion, danger, and Vivi’s memories of the country she is trying to save. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: He already left home. I'm guessing he's at the usual place right now.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Vivi, will you be having lunch with us?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Haha... What an odd country this is...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: For a princess to freely go in and about the homes of commoners...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Yes, it's proof of this country's peace...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Umm... Do you want lunch as well, Igaram?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No, no, I'm fine. I packed myself a little some- thing for the day already.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Well, I... I can't help it as a concerned father!

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: Please return to the Palace! This is no place for a king!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Heading out some- where, are ya? Mind if we accompany ya?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What? I thought we knocked these kids out already!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: These guys are trying to take you away!

summary: This part develops baroque works moves in secret and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
